description: Chronological feed of individual DHCP lease events for debugging. Kept on its own dashboard (with auto-refresh off and a short default range) so the raw-event queries only run when you open it.

links.title: ShadowDHCP overview
links.tooltip: Back to the aggregate overview dashboard

panels.description: Context for the event feed below: success and failure volume in the selected range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, countIf(success = 1) AS "v4 success", countIf(success = 0) AS "v4 failure" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, countIf(success = 1) AS "v6 success", countIf(success = 0) AS "v6 failure" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Event volume

panels.description: Newest first, latest 500 events in the selected range. Match shows how the reservation was found plus the request data that matched (mac, duid, or option 82/18/37 values); for unmatched requests it shows the identifiers the request carried, so you can see what failed to match. Use the Outcome and Search variables to narrow down — Search matches MAC, DUID, option 82/18/37 data, relay and reservation addresses.

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT timestamp AS "Time", success AS "OK", 'v4' AS "Proto", host_name AS "Server", coalesce(message_type, '') AS "Type", if(success = 1, concat('leased ', coalesce(toString(reservation_ipv4), '?'), ' to ', coalesce(mac_address, '?')), concat('failed to lease to ', coalesce(mac_address, '?'), ': ', coalesce(failure_reason, 'unknown'))) AS "Event", coalesce(mac_address, '') AS "MAC", multiIf(match_method = 'mac', concat('mac/', coalesce(extractor_used, ''), ': ', coalesce(mac_address, '')), match_method = 'option82', concat('option82/', coalesce(extractor_used, ''), ': ', arrayStringConcat(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', [coalesce(concat('circuit=', option82_circuit), ''), coalesce(concat('remote=', option82_remote), ''), coalesce(concat('subscriber=', option82_subscriber), '')]), ' ')), match_method IS NOT NULL, concat(coalesce(match_method, ''), '/', coalesce(extractor_used, '')), arrayStringConcat(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', [coalesce(concat('circuit=', option82_circuit), ''), coalesce(concat('remote=', option82_remote), ''), coalesce(concat('subscriber=', option82_subscriber), '')]), ' ')) AS "Match", toString(relay_addr) AS "Relay" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') AND multiIf('${outcome}' = 'all', 1, '${outcome}' = 'success', success = 1, success = 0) AND ('${search}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(coalesce(mac_address, ''), '${search}') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(toString(relay_addr), '${search}') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(coalesce(toString(reservation_ipv4), ''), '${search}') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(coalesce(option82_circuit, ''), '${search}') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(coalesce(option82_remote, ''), '${search}') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(coalesce(option82_subscriber, ''), '${search}') > 0) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp AS "Time", success AS "OK", 'v6' AS "Proto", host_name AS "Server", message_type AS "Type", if(success = 1, concat('leased ', arrayStringConcat(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', [coalesce(toString(reservation_ipv6_na), ''), coalesce(concat(toString(reservation_ipv6_pd_prefix), '/', toString(reservation_ipv6_pd_length)), '')]), ' + '), ' to ', coalesce(mac_address, coalesce(client_id, '?'))), concat('failed to lease to ', coalesce(mac_address, coalesce(client_id, '?')), ': ', coalesce(failure_reason, 'unknown'))) AS "Event", coalesce(mac_address, '') AS "MAC", multiIf(match_method = 'mac', concat('mac/', coalesce(extractor_used, ''), ': ', coalesce(mac_address, '')), match_method = 'duid', concat('duid: ', coalesce(client_id, '')), match_method = 'option1837', concat('option1837/', coalesce(extractor_used, ''), ': ', arrayStringConcat(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', [coalesce(concat('interface=', option1837_interface), ''), coalesce(concat('remote=', option1837_remote), '')]), ' ')), match_method IS NOT NULL, concat(coalesce(match_method, ''), '/', coalesce(extractor_used, '')), arrayStringConcat(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', [coalesce(concat('duid=', client_id), ''), coalesce(concat('interface=', option1837_interface), ''), coalesce(concat('remote=', option1837_remote), '')]), ' ')) AS "Match", toString(relay_addr) AS "Relay" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') AND multiIf('${outcome}' = 'all', 1, '${outcome}' = 'success', success = 1, success = 0) AND ('${search}' = '' OR positionCaseInsensitive(coalesce(mac_address, ''), '${search}') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(coalesce(client_id, ''), '${search}') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(toString(relay_addr), '${search}') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(coalesce(toString(reservation_ipv6_na), ''), '${search}') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(coalesce(concat(toString(reservation_ipv6_pd_prefix), '/', toString(reservation_ipv6_pd_length)), ''), '${search}') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(coalesce(option1837_interface, ''), '${search}') > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(coalesce(option1837_remote, ''), '${search}') > 0)) ORDER BY "Time" DESC LIMIT 500

panels.title: Recent events (v4 + v6)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT host_name FROM (SELECT host_name FROM dhcp.events_v4 UNION ALL SELECT host_name FROM dhcp.events_v6) WHERE host_name != '' ORDER BY host_name
list.label: Server
list.name: host
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT host_name FROM (SELECT host_name FROM dhcp.events_v4 UNION ALL SELECT host_name FROM dhcp.events_v6) WHERE host_name != '' ORDER BY host_name

title: ShadowDHCP event log
